audit_items.proof_trace: The balance check at L437-440 reads `IERC20(asset).balanceOf(address(this))` into `availableBalance` and reverts with `BidAmountTooHigh` if `amount > availableBalance`, directly enforcing the property before the `safeTransfer` at L444. The reentrancy guard (`s_entered = true` at L418) is set before the check, blocking any callback-based bypass. `AuctionBidder.bid` routes through `BaseAuction.bid`, providing no alternative path.
